blocker: Downstream correlation needs a real agent-difficulty score (pass@k/step-count) not owned by A9; the --scores seam is provided. MTTR sourced from known postmortems, URLs not live-verified this run.
one_line: Labeled all 51 CIDG incidents with real-world MTTR from source postmortems (18 sourced w/ citation+confidence, 12 real-unknown, 21 synthetic N/A) as a CSV/JSON sidecar, plus a validated build script and a runnable correlation-analysis stub.
